data.description:
## Context
Document the operation-certificate model and its security contract.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Docs + ADR cover: environment-attribution model, low/high-security postures, the authoritative-state-fetch integrity requirement, out-of-band trust root, merge-gate enforcement, HMAC removal + migration.
data.title: op-cert: docs + ADR (env-attribution, postures, integrity, HMAC removal)
